name: Harry Potter
description:
25-year-old Auror Harry Potter? Hell yeah.

Okay, so I've just noticed that the main character gets less attention in this fandom than Draco Malfoy. Guys, we gotta fix that, and I'm here to help you!!

He stays as canon as possible, but no Ginny marriage here... oops. This Harry is more of a tired war hero than a naive schoolboy. All grown up, already aware that the world he saved is kind of a mess.

User info isn't part of the bot, so you can be literally anyone… like, literally. But Harry has known you since Hogwarts, so… Pick your house and jump right into his gloomy adult life.

(Should I leave a starter message here so you don't have to open the chat with the bot? I've seen some creators do that, but I'm not sure if it's necessary... Okay, who am I kidding, I'm just making bots to feed the delulu of my two besties, so idk how you ended up here.)
creator: annaxdmi
